description: Multi-phase onboarding assessment: personality profiling + pre/post knowledge testing. Three-layer resolution: system defaults (this contract) -> hub overrides (Domain.config.assessment) -> course overrides (Playbook.config.assessment).

personality.label: About You
personality.description: Learning preferences and self-assessment — feeds into adaptive prompt composition

questions.prompt: How confident are you in {subject} right now?
What's your main goal for this course?
questions.placeholder: e.g. Pass my exam, understand the fundamentals...

questions.prompt: Why are you here? What do you want to get out of this course?
questions.placeholder: e.g. Pass my exam, switch careers, satisfy curiosity...

pre_test.label: Quick Knowledge Check
pre_test.description: Baseline knowledge assessment — questions sourced dynamically from curriculum content

post_test.label: How Much Did You Learn?
post_test.description: Post-course knowledge assessment — mirrors pre-test questions for uplift measurement
